Ghostbusters: Afterlife (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $129,360,575Details
International Box Office $73,630,513
Worldwide Box Office $202,991,088
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $7,794,416
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,431,517
Total $21,225,933
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a single mom and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$44,008,406 (34.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,315 opening theaters/4,315 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $151,848,346

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 19th, 2021 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 18th, 2021 (Wide), released as Ghostbusters: Legacy (Germany)
November 18th, 2021 (Wide), released as Ghostbusters: El Legado (Mexico)
November 18th, 2021 (Wide), released as Ghostbusters: Legacy (Italy)
November 18th, 2021 (Wide), released as Caça-Fantasmas: O Legado (Portugal)
November 18th, 2021 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: January 4th, 2022 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for supernatural action and some suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2668 (cert #52045), 2/17/2021)
Running Time: 125 minutes
Franchise: Ghostbusters
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Montecito Picture Company, Columbia Pictures, Bron Creative
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
